dialog.stepLabel: Jingzhu: "Hey there, it’s Jingzhu! I’m reaching out once again to ask ..."

items.speaker: Jingzhu
items.text: Hey there, it’s Jingzhu! I’m reaching out once again to ask for the help of you young folks.

options.text: What can I do for you?

items.speaker: Jingzhu
items.text: As usual, I’m doing just fine!

items.speaker: Jingzhu
items.text: A valiant Midnight Ranger like myself won’t be deterred by a few setbacks!

items.speaker: Jingzhu
items.text: Since we last met, I’ve been pondering a more practical approach...

items.speaker: Jingzhu
items.text: And I’ve finally devised one! Eager to put it into action!

items.speaker: Jingzhu
items.text: Hehe, yes. I’ve thought it over and I do need the help of you young folks.

items.speaker: Jingzhu
items.text: You don’t sound very enthusiastic, but it doesn’t matter. Once you arrive, you’ll be immediately convinced that my plan will work this time!

items.speaker: Jingzhu
items.text: I’ll be waiting for you at the Jinzhou Theater, and that red-haired Patroller will be joining us as well.

items.speaker: Jingzhu
items.text: And don’t you worry, I’ve already prepared your payment. I won’t let you work for free.

items.speaker: Jingzhu
items.text: Alright then, see you later!

items.speaker: Jingzhu
items.text: Alright then, see you later!

dialog.stepLabel: Chixia: "Nailed it! {PlayerName}, you’re really mastering this!..."

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: Nailed it! {PlayerName}, you’re really mastering this!

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: We did find some Tuners! I gotta admit, I was kinda wondering why you seemed so at ease out in the wild.

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: But now that I know you used to be a Midnight Ranger, it totally clicks!

items.speaker: Jingzhu
items.text: My captain taught me a lot... from uncovering Tacet Fields to identifying various Tacet Discords, even the places to find Tuners...

items.speaker: Jingzhu
items.text: However, memories tend to play tricks as you age, so I must see it with my own eyes to be certain.

items.speaker: Jingzhu
items.text: Even in the wild, I find myself relying on you young ones to help me reach my objectives.

items.speaker: Jingzhu
items.text: But enough dwelling on the melancholy. As long as the Echo gets stronger, I’m content.

dialog.stepLabel: Jingzhu: "No, no, no, don’t cry. Tell Grandpa what happened...."

items.speaker: Jingzhu
items.text: No, no, no, don’t cry. Tell Grandpa what happened.

items.speaker: Yingying
items.text: Grandma left early this morning, and when Dad noticed and went to find her, she was gone! *Sobbing*

items.speaker: Yingying
items.text: What if Grandma gets lost again...?

items.speaker: Jingzhu
items.text: Don’t worry, Yingying. Grandma will be alright. She’ll be back home soon.

items.speaker: Jingzhu
items.text: I must carefully consider why Linghan went out today. There must be a purpose behind it.

items.speaker: Unknown (83)
items.text: At that moment, there comes the ringing of the bell.

items.speaker: Jingzhu
items.text: Ah, I see... Today is... I know where she is. No need to worry. I’ll bring her back home safely.

items.speaker: Jingzhu
items.text: It’s reassuring to have your support. When it comes to Linghan’s safety, the more helpers, the better.

items.speaker: Jingzhu
items.text: Thank you, young ones... Words are inadequate to express my gratitude.

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: Yep! The more eyes we have, the faster we can track down Grandma Linghan.

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: But where on earth could Grandma Linghan have gone...?

items.speaker: Jingzhu
items.text: I think she might have gone to that cave near the edge of Jinzhou.

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: A cave, you say? Tacet Discords love hanging out in places like that. Let’s hurry and check it out!

dialog.stepLabel: Use Echo Hunting to track down the Flautist

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: This place is huge! How on earth are we going to find her? Ugh, it's so frustrating!

options.text: Do we have any other leads?

items.speaker: Jingzhu
items.text: Easy there, young one. There’s a clue that could help us locate Linghan swiftly.

items.speaker: Jingzhu
items.text: Now that you mention it, something just jogged my memory. It might help us locate Linghan swiftly.

items.speaker: Jingzhu
items.text: If my memory serves me right, she should be gathering the Echo of Flautist. Given her health, she wouldn’t venture to Tacet Fields, so she must be exploring the wild for scattered Tacet Discords.

items.speaker: Jingzhu
items.text: In our day, we relied on experience to locate Tacet Discords, but I’ve heard there are more advanced technologies available now.

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: Yep! The gourd just got upgraded with a search function. Let’s see if we can use it to spot any nearby Tacet Discords.

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: Don’t worry, {PlayerName}, it’s pretty straightforward. Normally, I’d give you time to figure it out yourself, but with Grandma Linghan missing, we can’t afford to waste any. Let me walk you through it.

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: You got it! I’ll be your guide through this.
